Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 
104 
PRVDR_GRP_ID 
LABEL: 
Submitting State Provider Group Identification Number 
DESCRIPTION: The unique, state-assigned identification number for the group with which the individual is associated. 
SHORT NAME: PRVDR_GRP_ID 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_GRP_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
30 (prior to the 2023 file, the length was 12) 
FILE(S): 
APR Affiliated Groups 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS
